headline: Netflix, Inc. (NFLX) Expands Consumer Products With New Partnerships and Strong Growth Outlook
summary: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) is one of the top stocks to buy for the long-term. On May 19, Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) announced at Licensing Expo in Las Vegas that Moose Toys will be the master toy partner for its upcoming animated film, Charlie vs. the Chocolate Factory, and preschool series, Young MacDonald. The company also partnered […]
